WHY CHOOSE US?

We at JC Group have perfected the art of business over time.

The bottom line?
We match best practices with international standards
in technology, infrastructure and design.

We focus on the how, so you can focus on the now.

While you were reading this, we probably got greener.

Each of our divisions is committed to continuously improving its environmental performance, meeting every legal requirement to counteract pollution. Our newest venture JC Solar erects solar power plants across India.

OUR STORY

1990

J.C. International Ltd begins operations and now supplies to the biggest fashion brands in the world and has a dedicated safety footwear division.

1993

Indotan Chemicals Ltd producing only Basic Chrome Sulphate, now produces a range of Chrome based chemicals in a recently acquired state of the art plant in Orissa.

2012

JC Infrastructure starts developing properties and building, with over a million sqft currently in development. JC Solar is launched shortly after.

1960

Our first trading unit supplies finished leather to shoe factories in and around Agra.

1980

Indian Tanning Industries (P) Ltd comes into existence
only to grow into what today is the largest tannery
in the Eastern region.

1990

J.C. International Ltd begins operations and now supplies to the biggest fashion brands in the world and has a dedicated safety footwear division.

1993

Indotan Chemicals Ltd producing only Basic Chrome Sulphate, now produces a range of Chrome based chemicals in a recently acquired state of the art plant in Orissa.

2012

JC Infrastructure starts developing properties and building, with over a million sqft currently in development. JC Solar is launched shortly after.

1960

Our first trading unit supplies finished leather to shoe factories in and around Agra.

1980

Indian Tanning Industries (P) Ltd comes into existence only to grow into what today is the largest tannery in the Eastern region.

1990

J.C. International Ltd begins operations and now supplies to the biggest fashion brands in the world and has a dedicated safety footwear division.
